description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: In the near term, Ecosystem Actor Viridian Advisors manages the list of Actor Reward Codes. In the future, all current Integrators and onboarding Integrators must be specified in [A.2.

.8.1.2.1.5 - Current And Onboarding Integrators](f3952cc5-cde2-46b9-b575-034dda83570b) so that Prime Agents, through their Operational Executor Agents, can onboard new partners themselves without having to go through a single party.
In the near term, Ecosystem Actor Viridian Advisors manages the list of Actor Reward Codes. In the future, all current Integrators and onboarding Integrators must be specified in [A.2.2.8.1.2.1.

- Current And Onboarding Integrators](f3952cc5-cde2-46b9-b575-034dda83570b) so that Prime Agents, through their Operational Executor Agents, can onboard new partners themselves without having to go through a single party.
description: Establishes a standalone Demand Side Buffer account for Distribution Reward and Integration Boost payments, simplifies expense recognition in the Monthly Settlement Cycle, and removes references to legacy roles from Near-Term Process documents.

diff: In the near term, Ecosystem Actor Viridian
manages the list of Actor Reward Codes.

current Integrators and onboarding Integrators must be specified in [A.2.2.8.1.2.1.6 - Current And Onboarding Integrators](f3952cc5-cde2-46b9-b575-034dda83570b) so that Prime Agents, through their Operational Executor Agents, can onboard new partners themselves without having to go through a single party.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
